benefits.description: After taking a shot of BPC-157 while sick with flu-like illness, fever gone and symptoms 90% alleviated within 24 hours including congestion, tiredness, headaches, muscle soreness, nausea
Reduced muscle/tendon strain from workout damage; dramatically sped up post-workout healing and reduced recovery time
Removing effects of nootropics, other medications, and caffeine while on BPC (interpreted as protective effect)

protocol_notes: Has tried 8-9 peptides total; rates BPC-157 and Bronchogen as Tier 1 for quality, safety, effectiveness, and benefit. Describes BPC as a 'miracle compound'. Stopped using BPC about a week before commenting.
